A Much Needed App .. and very Powerful

As my SEO world moves under my feet.. I can see the power of GEO based content. Blazly is a very well thought through GEO / SEO app that provides all the elements of a GEO / SEO strategy and it does it well. I had the pleasure of a demo from Jerry today .. although I could see the power of the tools before the demo .. you leave thinking wow.. 10/10 for the tools and 11/10 for Jerry providing the extraordinary level of customer support others should consider.. and at the time I was only on Tier 1.. a must have to win in the content game now.

Really appreciate this means a lot! 🙌 [...] With the AppSumo package, you also get access to Blazly SEO, which makes the deal even more attractive. I especially like the built‑in pillar page generator - it's very useful and works well in German too, which is a big plus for my use case.

I'm still in the testing and exploration phase with both Blazly SEO and Blazly GEO, but so far I'm really impressed. Both tools feel well thought out and clearly designed for where search is heading.

Another big positive: the support. I had direct contact with the Blazly co‑founder regarding activation questions for Blazly SEO, and he helped me very quickly. That kind of fast, personal support really builds trust.

Overall, a great toolset for anyone who wants to prepare their SEO strategy for AI search and GEO.

results.title: Automate Backlink Outreach with Blazly (Find Emails, Send & Track)
results.content:
# Automate Backlink Outreach with Blazly (Find Emails, Send & Track)
## Blazly AI
50 subscribers
3 likes

### Description
96 views
Posted: 23 Apr 2026
Build backlinks without the chaos.

In this demo, see how Blazly helps you go from finding opportunities to sending personalized outreach — all in one place.

🔹 Connect Gmail and send emails directly
🔹 Create campaigns and organize your outreach
🔹 Find verified contacts automatically
🔹 Generate personalized email subjects & drafts
🔹 Track replies and manage everything in one dashboard
🔹 Create ready-to-publish guest posts with backlinks

No spreadsheets. No tool switching. Just a simple, streamlined backlink workflow.

👉 Try Blazly backlinker: [...] Still sending backlink emails manually and tracking them in spreadsheets? With Blosly Backlinker, everything starts with your inbox. Just connect your Gmail and you're ready to send outreach directly from one place. Next, create your campaign. Start by adding your campaign name and your name for the email signature. Next, enter your website or client's URL to target for backlinks. Blosly will then analyze it and auto-suggest keywords you can select or add to. Once you add keywords, Blosly searches for relevant sites and let you select the best matches for backlink opportunities. You can then mark each as match or not match to shortlist opportunities. Blosly automatically finds verified emails for your selected opportunities. It then generates personalized subjects and email drafts for [...] then generates personalized subjects and email drafts for each contact, ready for you to review and launch your campaign in one click. Track every email you send, deliveries, opens, everything in one place. And when replies come in, Blosly captures them automatically, so you never miss a backlink opportunity. Need content, too? Blosly helps you find guest post opportunities and draft articles with backlinks built in. Enter your keyword, your website URL, and the target host URL. Blosly then generates a ready-to-use guest post you can copy and send for publishing. From outreach to replies to content, everything lives inside one simple workflow. Try Blosly today.

Q: Chatbot broken

I'm getting an error when trying to check GEO on my sites: Failed to fetch homepage. The website may be blocking requests, unreachable, or taking too long to respond.

How can I fix this, I use Duda for my website hosting if that helps? [...] Hi there,  
We have implemented this filtering feature for a few enterprise customers after having detailed calls with them. It required a lot of custom code changes within the app to support their specific use cases.  
So currently, this feature is not available in the AppSumo plan.  
Regarding the crawlers, if Blazly is not able to fetch information from your website, please let us know. We will check
